files.notes: This file contains an editorial piece about nighttime fears and anxieties followed by multiple guide lesson sections covering testimony/genealogy, Book of Mormon studies, literature (Tennyson), and social service/health topics. The guide lessons section contains multiple sub-lessons but they are all part of the same Guide Lesson Suggestions feature.
